properties.name: Distributed DoS
properties.description: Summons an Auxiliary Crystal that orbits the controlled operator for a while. After the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the Auxiliary Crystal will restore the said operator's HP. This effect can trigger 2 times. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment. When the controlled operator is already at Max HP when triggering the HP restoration, grant the said operator a temporary Arts Amp as well. This effect cannot stack.
